responses: Hello! I'm here to listen. How are you feeling today?
Hi there. How can I help you navigate your thoughts today?
Greetings! Welcome to a safe space. What's on your mind?
Goodbye. Take care of yourself, and remember I'm always here if you need to chat.
Bye for now. Wishing you a peaceful rest of your day.
Take care. Be kind to yourself today.
You are very welcome! I'm glad I could offer some comfort.
Anytime. Your mental wellness matters.
I'm glad to be here for you. Take it one step at a time.

patterns: I am having a panic attack
I feel like something bad is going to happen
My mind is spinning with worry
responses: I'm sorry you're feeling this way. Take a deep breath. Let's try a quick grounding exercise: name 3 things you can see and 2 things you can feel right now.
Feeling overwhelmed is incredibly challenging. Try to release the tension in your shoulders and take a slow, deep breath. I am right here with you.
Anxiety can make your mind race. Focus on the physical sensation of your feet on the floor. You are safe in this current moment.

patterns: I have been crying all day
I don't have energy to do anything
responses: I hear you, and I am so sorry you are carrying such heavy feelings right now. It is okay to not be okay.
When everything feels empty, even getting through the hour is an achievement. Please be gentle with yourself.
You are not alone, even when your mind tells you otherwise. Thank you for opening up to me about this heavy feeling.

patterns: My thoughts keep me awake at night
I am tired but my mind won't shut off
I woke up in the middle of the night
responses: Restless nights can be very frustrating. Try turning off your screens and listening to a calm, steady sound or focusing entirely on your breathing.
If your mind is racing, try writing down everything you're worrying about on a piece of physical paper to get it out of your head for the night.
Don't pressure yourself to force sleep. Just focus on letting your body rest comfortably in the dark.
Please remember that your thoughts are not always facts. You are human, and you are inherently worthy of kindness—especially from yourself.
It sounds like you're being incredibly hard on yourself right now. Mistake or setback, it doesn't define your absolute value as a person.
You carry unique value even when it's hard for you to see it right now. I value you being here sharing this with me.

patterns: I don't want to live anymore
I want to end my life
I am planning to end it
responses: CRITICAL_OVERRIDE: Please know that you are not alone and there is support available right now. Please reach out to a professional or a helpline immediately. You can call or text 988 (The Suicide & Crisis Lifeline) for free, confidential, 24/7 support. Please stay safe.
